name: ropgadget

metadata.name: ROPGadget
metadata.summary: This tool lets you search your gadgets on your binaries to facilitate your ROP exploitation.

documentation:
ROPgadget supports ELF, PE, Mach-O, and Raw formats on x86, x64, ARM, ARM64, PowerPC, SPARC, MIPS, RISC-V 64, and RISC-V Compressed architectures.
https://github.com/JonathanSalwan/ROPgadget

methods.name: ropgadget.loaders.universal.UNIVERSAL.getEntryPoint
documentation: TODO: These three will just return whatever is in the first binary.
Perhaps the rest of ROPgadget should support loading multiple binaries?
This class parses the Universal binary.

classes.name: ropgadget.loaders.pe.PE
documentation: This class parses the PE format.

modules.name: ropgadget.ropchain.arch.ropmakerx64
documentation: #  Florian Meier - 2014-08-31 - The 64b ROP chain generation

methods.name: ropgadget.core.Core._sectionInRange
documentation: Given a section and a range, edit the section so that all opcodes are within the range
